/usr/bin/ar qc liboftphysics.a CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/mhd_utils.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/oft_scalar_inits.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/oft_vector_inits.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/diagnostic.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/taylor.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/xmhd.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/xmhd_lag.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/tracing.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/gs_eq.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/tracing_2d.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/axi_green.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/grad_shaf.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/grad_shaf_profiles.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/grad_shaf_prof_phys.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/grad_shaf_util.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/grad_shaf_fit.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/grad_shaf_td.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/thin_wall.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/thin_wall_solvers.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftphysics.dir/thin_wall_hodlr.F90.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liboftphysics.a
